name: coding-agents
description: プロジェクト cwd を現場として読み、サブエージェント開発チームで intake / planning / execution / audit を行う。

interface.shortDescription: Project intake and agent-team execution for coding work.
interface.longDescription: Treats the current project cwd as the jobsite, then coordinates intake, planning, execution material, and audit through a parent agent and scoped specialist subagents.
defaultPrompt: Run Coding Agents intake for this repo.
Plan this coding task with scoped subagents.
